subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One. We have hearkened unto it and beheld it, and have deigned to answer with this Most Exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت نزد مظلوم حاضر شنیدیم و دیدیم و باینکلمه علیا جواب عنایت فرمودیم کن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
